message.content: @startuml title Shared memory receiver behaviour participant "Shared\nmemory\nreceiver" as SMR #LightBlue20 box Coordination struct LightGrey participant "Reader count var" as RCV #WhiteSmoke participant "locks_active\n(mutex)" as LA #WhiteSmoke participant "locks_leaving\n(semaphore)" as LL #WhiteSmoke participant "Semaphore copy" as SC #WhiteSmoke end box participant Copy buff as CB #LightGreen35 SMR -> SMR : create alt ["Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"] note right of SMR: Create semaphore \nto Semaphore coord else endif activate SMR note over SMR,CB#Line.Dashed:#DarkGray;Writer sets up sharedmem\or y\nand signals Writer is ready :) ; deactivate SMR group wait [ok] activate SMR group reincrease alt [] opt this way all readers access the mem ory,\nthey will fail on the copy sem rect rgb(198, 247, 67) 'MMMap coordination struct trylock copy semaphore to SC else Can't lock Fail end success Success MMmap copy buffer from CB read_flag set true in SMR Lock leaving[1] -->LL Signal reader ready back to writer Close coordination semaphore file deactivate SMR return Success @enduml
